caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Seas Impact Grand Cayman Today
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is experiencing moderate winds up to 17 kt with wave heights reaching 6.1 ft from the SSE and a swell period of 7 seconds. Rain probability is high at 75%, creating wet conditions for port operations while Cozumel sees lighter winds near 14 kt and less impact today.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Calm Seas in Mediterranean Ports
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing moderate westerly winds at 21 kt with wave heights reaching 4.5 ft and a swell period of 9 seconds. Rain probability remains less than 10% with Venice seeing lighter winds at 11 kt and similarly low rain chances.
